# Eledent Dental Hospitals

> Eledent Dental Hospitals is a multi-branch dental hospital group based in Hyderabad, India. It offers comprehensive dental care including routine check-ups, dental implants, orthodontics, root canal treatment, smile makeovers, and cosmetic dentistry across five branches in Kondapur, Kukatpally (KPHB), Banjara Hills, Manikonda, and Kompally (Suchitra). Clinic hours are 9:00 AM to 9:00 PM daily. Contact: +91 77997 19994 | +91 99838 68366 | contact@eledenthospitals.com

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://eledenthospitals.com): Main overview of Eledent Dental Hospitals, services, locations, technology, and patient care philosophy.
- [About Us](https://eledenthospitals.com/about-us): Background, mission, treatment philosophy, and approach to evidence-based dentistry.
- [Contact Us](https://eledenthospitals.com/contact-us): Branch addresses, contact details, and enquiry form.
- [Facility](https://eledenthospitals.com/facility): Information about clinic ambience, sterilization systems, in-house pharmacy, hygiene cafeteria, and patient comfort amenities.
- [Technology](https://eledenthospitals.com/technology): Details about CEREC CAD/CAM, CBCT 3D X-ray, Digital Smile Designing, laser dentistry, Zoom whitening, microscopic endodontics, and guided implant planning.
- [Guided Biofilm Therapy (GBT)](https://eledenthospitals.com/guided-biofilm-therapy-gbt): Professional dental cleaning system for oral hygiene, implant maintenance, and orthodontic appliance care.
- [Blogs](https://eledenthospitals.com/blogs): Educational dental articles on treatments, procedures, oral health, and pricing.
- [Privacy Policy](https://eledenthospitals.com/privacy-policy): Website privacy and data usage policy.
- [Terms and Conditions](https://eledenthospitals.com/terms-and-conditions): Terms governing use of the website and services.

## Services

- [Services Overview](https://eledenthospitals.com/services): Main services listing page for all treatments offered by Eledent Dental Hospitals.
- [Advanced & Painless Dental Implants](https://eledenthospitals.com/services/advanced-and-painless-dental-implants): Dental implant treatment including single implants, All-on-4, All-on-6, full-mouth rehabilitation, CBCT-guided planning, and multiple implant brand options.
- [Single Visit Dentistry](https://eledenthospitals.com/services/single-visit-dentistry): Same-day crowns, bridges, fillings, and select implant restorations using digital workflows.
- [Atraumatic Extraction](https://eledenthospitals.com/services/atraumatic-extraction): Minimally traumatic tooth removal for a more comfortable extraction experience.
- [Teeth Whitening](https://eledenthospitals.com/services/teeth-whitening): Professional teeth whitening using Zoom whitening technology.
- [Dental Crowns](https://eledenthospitals.com/services/dental-crowns): Zirconia and ceramic crowns, including same-day delivery for selected cases.
- [Invisalign Treatment Hyderabad](https://eledenthospitals.com/services/invisalign-treatment-hyderabad): Clear aligner orthodontic treatment planned using digital scans.
- [Laser Gum Treatment Hyderabad](https://eledenthospitals.com/services/laser-gum-treatment-hyderabad): Laser-assisted gum and soft-tissue treatment with minimal bleeding and faster healing.
- [Smile Makeover Hyderabad](https://eledenthospitals.com/services/smile-makeover-hyderabad): Custom smile design combining veneers, crowns, whitening, aligners, implants, and gum correction.
- [Wisdom Teeth Removal](https://eledenthospitals.com/services/wisdom-teeth-removal): Wisdom tooth extraction with local anesthesia and advanced surgical support.
- [Braces & Aligners](https://eledenthospitals.com/services/braces-aligners): Orthodontic correction with metal, ceramic, self-ligating braces, and clear aligners.
- [Root Canal Treatment](https://eledenthospitals.com/services/root-canal-treatment): Root canal treatment using rotary and microscopic endodontic techniques.
- [Dental Veneers](https://eledenthospitals.com/services/dental-veneers): Veneers for correcting discoloration, chips, gaps, and smile shape.
- [Orthodontic Treatment](https://eledenthospitals.com/services/orthodontic-treatment): Bite correction and teeth alignment treatment for children, teens, and adults.
- [Tooth Pain Treatment](https://eledenthospitals.com/services/tooth-pain-treatment): Same-day diagnosis and treatment planning for tooth pain using advanced imaging and diagnostics.
- [Teeth Gap Treatment](https://eledenthospitals.com/services/teeth-gap-treatment): Gap closure through bonding, veneers, braces, or aligners based on clinical need.
- [Dental Fillings](https://eledenthospitals.com/services/dental-fillings): Tooth-coloured fillings for cavities and minor tooth damage.

## Location Hub Pages

- [Kondapur Branch](https://eledenthospitals.com/kondapur): Branch serving Kondapur, Kothaguda, HITEC City, Gachibowli, Hafeezpet, and Whitefield.
- [Kukatpally Branch](https://eledenthospitals.com/kukatpally): Branch serving KPHB Colony, Nizampet, Miyapur, and Pragathi Nagar.
- [Manikonda Branch](https://eledenthospitals.com/manikonda): Branch serving Manikonda, Shaikpet, Khajaguda, and Film Nagar.
- [Kompally Branch](https://eledenthospitals.com/kompally): Branch serving Suchitra, Jeedimetla, Suraram, Quthbullapur, Chintal, and Dullapally.
- [Banjara Hills Branch](https://eledenthospitals.com/banjara-hills): Branch serving Banjara Hills, Jubilee Hills, Film Nagar, and Srinagar Colony.

## Blog Posts

- [Dental Implant Cost in Hyderabad](https://eledenthospitals.com/blogs/dental-implant-cost-in-hyderabad): Detailed guide to dental implant prices, implant brands, full-mouth options, treatment steps, and healing timeline.

## Key Facts

- Name: Eledent Dental Hospitals
- Type: Multi-branch dental hospital group
- Location: Hyderabad, India
- Branches: Kondapur, Kukatpally (KPHB), Banjara Hills, Manikonda, Kompally (Suchitra)
- Hours: 9:00 AM to 9:00 PM daily
- Phone: +91 77997 19994, +91 99838 68366
- Email: contact@eledenthospitals.com
- Consultation Fee: ₹300
- Experience: 20+ years
- Cases Treated: 30,000+
- Root Canal Cases: 27,000+
- Implant Cases: 22,000+
- Braces and Aligner Cases: 9,500+
- Smile Makeover Cases: 5,000+
- Warranty: Lifetime on implants and crowns, 5 years on root canal treatments
- Technology: CEREC CAD/CAM, CBCT 3D X-ray, intraoral 3D scanners, Zoom whitening, advanced laser, Guided Biofilm Therapy, microscopic endodontics, in-house 3D printing, self-disinfecting dental chairs
- Implant Brands: Noris, Alphabio, Dio, Osstem, Nobel Replace, Nobel Active, Straumann BLX, Straumann Roxolid
